description: Synthetic listening samples for encoder subjective checks.

cases.title: Synthetic Voiced Speech Pulses
cases.notes: Voiced syllable-like pulses with deterministic fricative noise.

cases.title: Harmonic Stereo Music Phrase
cases.notes: Bass, lead, and side energy for stereo/intensity decisions.

cases.title: Stereo Transient Bursts
cases.notes: Short deterministic bursts for transient handling checks.

cases.title: Lowband Mono Sweep
cases.notes: Narrowband tonal sweep for low-rate speech tuning.
